title: Adoption a matter of right
doc_html:
§50.  Adoption a matter of right

The servitude owner may adopt the operations of another as a matter of right.  Consent of the party conducting them is not required.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §50, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
